titleStmt.title: SII 27.120: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 120. (A.R. No. 323 of 1931-32.) KOKKARAṆI, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab lying on the roadside.

This damaged record registers a gift of land to god Śaṅkaranārāyaṇa of Koḍage by Gōvinda-seṭṭi nephew (?) of Bemmaṇancha, during the period of Nāgaṇṇa-Toḷaha when Timmaṇṇa-voḍeya was governing Bārakūru-rājya.

It is dated Śaka 1356, Dundubhi, Phālguṇa, ba. [4, Monday]. The given Śaka year coincides with the cyclic year Ānanda when the other details do not tally. The cyclic year Dundubhi in the reign of this king coincides with Śaka 1364 when the details correspond to 1443 A.D., February 18. The Śaka year given must be, therefore, a mistake for Śaka 1364.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ śrī sarasvatyāyana
ma śrī gurubhyōṁ nama namastuṁga śirastuṁga ca
ṁdra cāmara cāravē trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
la staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayābhyudaya sakavaruśa
1356 neya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada phālguṇa ba 4 sōlu
śrīmaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara Arirāya vibhāḍa
bhāṣege tappuvarāyara gaṁḍa pūrva dakṣiṇa paścima samu
drādhīśvara śrīvīrapratāpa gajabēṁṭhekāṟa dēvarāya ma
hārāyaru sukasaṁkatā vinōdadiṁ rājyava pratipālisu
tirddakāladali śrī maṁmahāpradhāna tiṁmaṇa voḍeya
ru bārakūra rājyavanāḷuvali nāgaṁca toḷaha
ra kāladalu kumāra vrittiya beṁmaṇaṁ ḷiyako
ḷiya gōviṁda seṭhiyaru saha ṁgeyaru
ḍageya śaṁkaranārāya paḍuvabeṭṭinali A nagade
mā paḍugā mekeya catusīmeya vivara mūḍalu
gadeya gadeyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu gauḷiya gadeyi
ṁdaṁ Uḷitakaḷa gōviṁda seṭhiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍu
valu harida bacaliṁda mūḍalu teṁkalu gōviṁda seṭhiya ga
deyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu Uḷitana gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu baḍa
galu koccāḷuva māḍida dharmada bāḷiṁdaṁ kalukūrina gaḍiyi
ṁda teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeya Oḷage kalukūrina gaḍi
ṁda baḍagaṇa gade hoṟagāgi moṟabana gadde sahita bittuva bede
gaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu 7 mūḍe Alli Uḷaṁthā make maki
nere niḍilu hakalu haḍusahavāgi śaṁkaranārāyaṇa dēvara
pāṇi pīṭhadali dharmake dhāreyaneṟadanu yi bāḷiṁge te
ṟa . gaṁ . O gaṁ . yi bāḷa teṟu Osaṁgeya yibā
ḷa mūlanaḍau Aki hadināṟu hāneyali Ora
Akiya Akiya O morabana gadeya kruṣṇa kalukura
yaru mūlapa koḍalu yi bāḷa
na kālakālake naḍasi bahanu kālada Akisi kruṣṇa
yakāru ḍasuvanu yiṁtha bāḷanu
nāyaru mūlava koṭheU yi bāḷa
tti kālakālake yeṁṭumūḍe Akkiyanu naḍasi ba
hanu Oṁdukāladalu Akiyanu koṭu
ḍasuvanu yi śāsanake
ppa śrīmahādēvaru toḷahara
barahā mahādēvaru saṁkara
gadeya
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.120 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
